subgoals.description: venue_search(near='Haymarket', party_size=6, budget_max_gbp=800); get_weather(city='edinburgh', date='2026-04-25'); calculate_cost(venue_id=use the venue id returned by venue_search, party_size=6, duration_hours=3, catering_tier='bar_snacks'); generate_flyer(event_details={"venue_name": "venue_search_result.name", "address": "venue_search_result.address", "weather": "get_weather_result.condition", "total_cost": "calculate_cost_result.total", "date": "2026-04-25", "time": "19:30", "party_size": 6})
